[e][e][e]Hello MrBeast I truly take no pleasure in having to say this to you but I am currently going through a very difficult time. I am in the 6th grade and my school fees are extremely high. My father is the sole earning member of our family and he struggles to manage our household expenses. I also have a sister who attends school and her fees must be paid as well. We don't even own a home of our own; we live in a rented house. My father earns just $117 out of which he has to pay my sister's and my school fees; consequently there is hardly any money left for us to afford decent food or clothing. We don't even have enough money to buy a vehicle. If you wouldn't mindplease please pleasecould you donate a little money to me? Hi MrBeast My name is Ace from the Philippines. I know you receive millions of messages but Im hoping somehow this one reaches you. Last month my father passed away after a road accident. He was 62 years old and the main provider for our family. Losing him has been the hardest moment of our lives. Aside from the pain of losing him we are now struggling to survive without his support. Right now I work as a driver for 1215 hours every day. But the car I drive is not mine. After paying the boundary and fuel I only bring home about 1000 a day. I keep pushing myself because my family depends on me. My biggest dream is simple: to own a 7-seater vehicle so I can work as a TNVS driver with my own unit. Something like a Hyundai Stargazer X Premium would completely change our lives. Instead of paying boundary every trip I drive would directly support my family. Im not asking for a luxury life. I just want the chance to work harder and build a stable future for the people who depend on me. Youve changed the lives of so many people around the world. If by any miracle you see this message it would mean everything to my family. Thank you for inspiring people like me to never give up. God bless you.
